title: Duplicate companies in search results
symptom: A search returns the same company several times with slightly different names.
root_cause: Dedup key used the company name only, so normalized-name collisions slipped through.
fix: Switch the dedup key to canonical domain + registry id, and add a fuzzy-name fold step.

title: Size filter leaks out-of-range companies
symptom: Filtering by employee size still returns companies clearly outside the selected band.
root_cause: Size band applied to a stale denormalized field instead of the latest headcount snapshot.
fix: Filter on the current headcount snapshot and reindex; add a guard test for band edges.

title: Stale deal valuations shown as current
symptom: Deal pages display old valuation figures that disagree with the latest filings.
root_cause: Valuation cache TTL was effectively infinite; refresh job silently failed on auth.
fix: Set a 24h TTL, alert on refresh-job failures, and prefer filing-sourced values for public acquirers.

title: Category drift in industry tagging
symptom: Companies get tagged into adjacent but wrong industry categories over time.
root_cause: Classifier confidence threshold too low; low-confidence tags were auto-applied.
fix: Raise the auto-apply threshold and route low-confidence tags to a review queue.

title: Slack webhook returns 401
symptom: Notifications stopped posting to Slack and the logs show repeated 401 errors.
root_cause: Rotated Slack signing secret was not picked up; old secret cached in the worker.
fix: Read the signing secret per-request from the secret store and drop the in-process cache.

title: PostHog webhook signature mismatch
symptom: Incoming PostHog events are rejected with an HMAC signature verification failure.
root_cause: Body was parsed to JSON before computing the HMAC, changing the raw bytes.
fix: Compute HMAC over the raw request body buffer before any parsing.

title: Session classifier times out on long sessions
symptom: Classifying very long user sessions intermittently times out and drops the result.
root_cause: Whole session sent in one model call; payload exceeded the timeout budget.
fix: Chunk the session, classify chunks in parallel, and merge with a reducer step.

title: Daily digest posts twice
symptom: The daily frustration-signal digest is delivered to the channel two times.
root_cause: Scheduler ran on two replicas without a distributed lock.
fix: Add an idempotency key per day and a short-lived distributed lock around the job.
